goal: Verify Codex CLI Definition, AgentFile, required model protocol, and credential source boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Codex requires an openai-compatible model binding.

goal: Verify current Codex image, version, and connected Runner without launching a Pod.
acceptance_criteria: Catalog and Docker image share the current Codex digest.
Runner reports codex-cli 0.144.5 and a connected tunnel.

goal: Verify browser validation, plan, and template apply with a resolved required model binding.
acceptance_criteria: Template and launch validation and plans pass.
Snapshot pins qa-primary-model and no Worker launch or Pod exists.

goal: Independently confirm that the Codex record is precreation-only and that runtime preferences are not credentials.
acceptance_criteria: Review rejects a supported claim without live evidence.
Review confirms plaintext runtime preferences are not accepted as credential evidence.

goal: After named approval only, verify model-resource credential use, disposable Pod, ACP terminal, provider smoke, and cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Named organization model-resource approval is recorded.
Live launch, ACP terminal, provider result, and cleanup pass the live verifier.
